name: Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
The 1 oz square of unsweetened chocolate should be melted.
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press this mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form cake pan.
3. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, remaining sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Add one egg to the cream cheese mixture at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in the melted unsweetened chocolate until fully incorporated.
7. Pour half of this batter over the crust in the cake pan, then use a knife to cut through both the new and old batters for a marble effect.
8. Add more cream cheese mixture on top, again cutting through with the knife.
9. Bake at 450 degrees F for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F.
11. Continue baking until set, about 30 more minutes.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool before inverting the cake onto a serving plate.
13. Chill thoroughly before serving.
